blended.narrative: Belleayre Mountain is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 3.4 inches of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 3,016 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 6 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Tomorrow: 2.1" of snow, highs of 30°F. Expect variable conditions.
Tuesday: light freezing drizzle, highs of 38°F.
